title: Sasha Alex Sloan - Dancing With Your Ghost
youtube_title: Sasha Alex Sloan - Dancing With Your Ghost (Lyric Video)
lyrics:
Yellin' at the sky, screamin' at the world
Baby, why'd you go away, I'm still your girl?
Holdin' on too tight, head up in the clouds
Heaven only knows where you are now

How do I love?
How do I love again?
How do I trust?
How do I trust again?

I stay up all night, tell myself I'm alright
Baby, you're just harder to see than most
I put the record on, wait 'til I hear our song
Every night I'm dancing with your ghost
Every night I'm dancing with your ghost

Never got the chance
To say a last goodbye
I gotta move on
But it hurts to try

How do I love?
How do I love again?

How do I trust again?

I put the record on, wait 'til I hear our song
